title: okipiak's Stuff
description: Cheese, New plant, New totems, Tweaks and more.
body:
![Logo Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36896148eecb51f794a36efbf5f929becef25f13_0.webp)

### Salutations!

I’m okipiak, an amateur content creator. In this project, I’ve made a selection of (I belive) unique items. 

# ⚠️ THIS DATAPACK IS NO LONGER SUPPORTED ⚠️
**I have discontinued work on this project due to time constraints. This datapack is not optimized and lacks an uninstall option, so I strongly recommend not using it.**

However, I am now working on something new this time, it won’t be a datapack but Minecraft mod!

<details>
<summary>Info</summary>
  
  This datapack is translated to 4 languages: Polish, English, LolCat and Interslavic (also known     as Medžuslovjansk). 
  
  Feel free to add this to your server. 

</details>

<details>
<summary>Addons</summary>

## Addons are seperated features, that are in the main project.
  
[Simply Cheese Addon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/simply-cheese)

[Totems of Wonder Addon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/simply-cheese)

</details>

## If you want to get more info about the things added, go to the [wiki page of this project](https://github.com/okipiak/okipiak-s-Stuff/wiki).

### In the newer versions, you can test experimental features by using: `function okipiak:test`


<details>
<summary>Images</summary>

## New plant; Tidebloom Ivy
![Tidebloom Ivy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c61c622bcea52fc154c48b9cb41678180bab5b28.png)

## New paintings; "Faded Glory" and "Echoes of Nowhere"
![Faded Glory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d50dcbfb2b140e7ca01ab173847dfe62148311a9.png)

![Echoes of Nowhere](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da8501b98522f461fc153e8ad5766f00610ef59b.png)

## For more go to the [wiki page of this project](https://github.com/okipiak/okipiak-s-Stuff/wiki).

</details>



<details>
<summary>Some nerd talk</summary>

Totems are just repeating command block with different texture, and different components.

Food items are just bread with different texture, and different components.

Baguette model is not mine, I took it from [23w13a_or_b snapshot](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_23w13a_or_b).

Cheese concept isn't entirely original; it’s inspired by the [Rats mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/rats).

I used [this Raycasting Generator](https://sourceblock.net/beta/en-US/tools/data-packs/raycasting-generator) to make milk cauldron work.

I used [this Generator](https://misode.github.io/) for loot tables and advancements.

Datapack uses this [Custom License](https://github.com/okipiak/okipiak-s-Stuff/blob/main/LICENSE.txt).

## If you found a bug, please report it on [github issue tracker](https://github.com/okipiak/okipiak-s-Stuff/issues)

</details>

### ⚠️ FROM VERSION 0.68+ TOTEMS ARE NO LONGER IN A ADDON, THEY ARE NOW ADDED BACK. ⚠️
